title: SimplyBetter
description: A lightweight modpack which adds more to every aspect of Minecraft.
body:
Step into a vastly enhanced world with the SimplyBetter modpack, designed for adventurers and explorers alike. This modpack brings a fresh experience to your game by expanding the terrain, adding rich, diverse biomes and giving you access to a whole new range of tools, weapons, and armor to conquer these realms.

New Biomes: Explore lush forests, frozen tundras, arid deserts, and otherworldly landscapes, each with unique flora, fauna, and hidden treasures.

Expanded Armory: Arm yourself with a wide variety of new weapons.

Compatibility & Tweaks: Carefully curated to ensure smooth performance and compatibility with your favorite mods. This modpack includes optimization tweaks so you can explore your new worlds without compromising performance.

 New Structues: These new structures are packed with treasures, traps, and challenges. Whether you're looting an abandoned fortress or deciphering the secrets of a long-lost temple, there’s always a new adventure around the corner.

================================================================                                    

For Low end pc's:                                                                                 

i. Turn off distant horizons                                                                                 
ii. Turn all the settings to fast                                                                                 
iii. Particles to decreased or minimal                                                                                 

This wont be necessary as optimizion mods have been added
